Chapter.Label: Chapter_SourceAPI
Chapter.Heading: Source API
Chapter.Section:
Declarations
AutoDocTest_GlobalFunction is a documented placeholder used by the package-context regression manual.
AutoDocTest_Operation takes an object together with a positive integer and returns that integer unchanged.
AutoDocTest_Attribute records a small attribute entry for solvable groups.
AutoDocTest_Property is a tiny property used to exercise method docs.
true or false

Implementations
The global function prints a stable sentence so it is easy to mention in the mock manual.
The method for AutoDocTest_Operation returns the second argument.
The attribute method simply returns the group itself.
The property method reuses IsAbelian for nilpotent groups.
